chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 45 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.4266/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.4647/2023 (E/A) 4. For hearing of main case 08.09.2023 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this transfer application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
